agent_model_removed.description: Tests importing removed 'Agent' model from refactoring
agent_model_removed.fix_strategy: Replace 'Agent' imports with 'MCPAgentJob' model or remove if obsolete. Update test assertions to use new model fields.

module_import_moved.description: Import paths changed during service extraction (e.g., agent_communication_queue)
module_import_moved.fix_strategy: Update import paths to new module locations after service refactoring. Use grep to find all occurrences and batch update.

collection_errors_syntax.description: Syntax errors preventing test collection (indentation, missing markers)
collection_errors_syntax.fix_strategy: Fix indentation error + add pytest marker to pyproject.toml

missing_modules.fix_strategy: Either restore removed modules or delete obsolete tests. Requires architectural review.

refactoring_todos.description: Tests marked with TODO(0127a-2) for MCPAgentJob refactoring
refactoring_todos.fix_strategy: Complete MCPAgentJob model refactoring and update test fixtures/assertions. Coordinate with service layer changes.

database_errors.description: Database connection/authentication failures during test execution
database_errors.fix_strategy: Root cause: Tests using 'giljo_user' which doesn't exist. Fix test fixtures to use correct database credentials or create proper test database user. May be fixture configuration issue.

assertion_failures.description: Tests running but failing assertions (logic/expectation mismatches)
assertion_failures.fix_strategy: Requires individual analysis. May be due to: changed service interfaces, updated business logic, modified database schemas, or outdated test expectations.
